title: EL logline
content:
EL logline

EL is about a teen finding their voice in a world of adults

Among controlling adults keeping her quiet, an imaginative mute teen bonds with a complicated artist and finds her voice in the struggle against the [chaos] threatening to swallow her whole.

A highly imaginative, mute teen bonds with a complicated artist and discovers her voice in a world of controlling and manipulative scoundrels.

El wakes up and takes her childhood medication. Receives a notification from someone she is excited to hear from. Then her parents break the news to her.

A medicated mute teen bonds with a complicated artist and discovers her voice in a world of controlling, manipulative, and drug addicted [adults/people].


El shows up to Sheen’s house. Turns into Sheen. Becomes her. El disappeared, she becomes the missing one. Dave shows up to the house looking for El, finds sheen instead, sheen insists she’s not dead. Sheen gravities back to El’s life. And starts to break into Sandra’s apartment. This forces confrontations !!!!!
